findings.summary: Full 9x9 sequences still exceed one-pass context by 4366934 to 4811021 tokens, but the canonical learned lane is explicitly re-scoped to bounded `incremental_decode_window` windows with separate early, later, and suffix artifacts instead of pretending flat-prefix fit. Longest shared sequence is 5335309 tokens against a 524288-token model context.
This run is an explicit bounded windowed truth run: training-time validation is capped at the first 512 target tokens, and later-window plus suffix artifacts stay separate from full-trace exactness.

Later-window truth is now explicit on the same checkpoint: early first-32 exactness is 5938 bps, the fixed later window is 8438 bps, and the furthest fittable suffix window is 8438 bps; these are bounded window metrics, not full-trace closure.
Even on that bounded window, validation is still red: first-target exactness is 10000 bps, first-32 exactness is 5938 bps, and exact traces are 0/1.
